programme.title: Live Premier League
programme.desc: Wolverhampton Wanderers v Liverpool (Kick-off 8.15pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Molineux, as the hosts search for three points in their unlikely quest to stay in the Premier League. The reverse fixture in December saw Liverpool score twice in two minutes at the end of the first half to earn themselves a 2-1 victory at Anfield. Santiago Bueno's goal in the 51st minute had made it 2-1 to give Wolves hope but Liverpool held on for an important win.
